g.text: 0x08 | char* | path // ptr into raw recv buf
0x20 | header_kv_t* | headers // ptr to header array
0x30 | --- CACHE LINE 1 END (48 B used of 64 B) ---
0x30 | const char* | body // ptr past CRLFCRLF
Total: 64 bytes — fits in ONE 64-byte cache line
0x10 | char* | value // trimmed OWS, unfolded obs-fold
Total: 32 bytes per entry — 2 entries per cache line
Hot dispatch path: method+path+headers* — 3 fields, 1 cache-line fetch
headers[1] @ base+0x20 (32 B) — shares cache line with [0]
headers[2] @ base+0x40 (32 B) — new cache line
Array total: 32 × 32 B = 1024 B (16 cache lines)
http_method_t: GET=0 HEAD=1 POST=2 OTHER=3 (4 B)
recv() buf[8192] — raw bytes off wire
scan for CRLFCRLF — O(n) memchr loop
parse_headers() — scan \n, tolower name, strip OWS, unfold obs-fold
Zero-copy: path, body point INTO recv buf — no memcpy for values
arg: const char* name (must be lowercase)
N<=32: linear scan fits in 2 cache lines — faster than hash table
